title: iQOO Z11 debuts with 9,020 mAh battery, Z11x tags along with 7,050 mAh cell
description: The latest additions to the iQOO Z-series are now official in China and they pair massive batteries with MediaTek chipsets, 50MP main cams and IP69 ingress protection. The brand-new iQOO Z11 offers a 9,050mAh Si-C cell alongside 90W charging while the Z11x, which previously made its debut in India, dials down to a still respectable 7,050mAh capacity with 44W charging. iQOO Z11 The vanilla iQOO Z11 is built around a 6.83-inch AMOLED with FHD+ resolution and a 165Hz refresh rate, with the latter being a first for the iQOO brand. The panel is rated at up to 2,000 nits peak local brightness...

title: Oppo K15 Pro series launch date confirmed
description: Oppo has confirmed that it will launch its new K15 Pro series in China. The lineup is expected to succeed last year’s K13 Turbo and K13 Turbo Pro. A recent leak suggests the devices could be sold as the K14 Turbo and K14 Turbo Pro in global markets. The Oppo K15 Pro series will go official in China on April 1. Meanwhile, interested customers can head to the official Oppo online store in the country and pre-book the phones. While Oppo didn’t reveal any major details about the upcoming K15 Pro series phones, it did confirm that they will offer a metal frame and LED lighting on the...

title: Samsung expands its One UI 8.5 beta program, includes older Galaxy devices
description: Stable One UI 8.5 with Android 16 underneath is currently available only on the newly released Galaxy S26 series, but roughly three months ago, Samsung announced the One UI 8.5 beta program for the Galaxy S25 series. Later on, the Galaxy Z Fold7 and Z Flip7 were also added to the list of eligible devices. Now, the company is expanding the One UI 8.5 beta program to a lot more devices. Owners of the Galaxy S24 series, Galaxy Z Fold6, Galaxy Z Flip6, Galaxy S25 FE, Galaxy S24 FE and Galaxy Tab S11 can finally enroll in the One UI 8.5 beta testing program via the Samsung Members...

title: The vivo V70 FE is launching in India next week
description: The vivo V70 FE is launching in India a week from now – the exact time and date is noon on April 2 (Thursday). The phone will be available through vivo itself, as well as retailers like Amazon. The phone originally launched in Indonesia earlier this month. We have a review unit at the office. The retail box came with a 90W charger, a USB cable and a transparent case (those are the contents for Indonesia, anyway). The phone will be offered in Monsoon Blue and Northern Lights Purple, which are not the same colors that are available in Indonesia (though the Ocean Blue looks similar...

title: Samsung Galaxy A37 and A57 make their way to India
description: Following their global launch yesterday, Samsung India has now brought over the Galaxy A37 and Galaxy A57 to the local market. The pair bring updated designs, Exynos chips and triple cameras while also boasting 5,000 mAh batteries with 45W charging. For more details, you can check out our launch news story, which covers all key details for the new A-series phones. Galaxy A37 and Galaxy A57 Galaxy A57 comes in Awesome Navy, Awesome Icyblue, and Awesome Lilac colors. The baseline 8/256GB version starts at INR 56,999 ($606) while the 12/256GB version will go for INR 62,999...

title: More details about the vivo Pad6 Pro leak
description: Earlier this month at MWC in Barcelona, vivo showcased its upcoming tablet, the Pad6 Pro. As the name implies, this will be the successor to the Pad5 Pro which launched back in April of 2025, and the Pad6 Pro is going to become official alongside the X300 Ultra and X300s smartphones on March 30. Ahead of that, a new rumor from Digital Chat Station (DCS) on Weibo brings us a few more details about the device. vivo has already teased the fact that the Pad6 Pro has a 4K screen, and DCS has now also told us that it's going to be of the LCD variety. vivo Pad6 Pro official...

title: Apple testing a 200MP rear camera for future iPhone, rumor claims
description: While Android smartphones have been offering large 200MP sensors for some time, Apple has yet to introduce a similar sensor on the iPhone. That could change soon, according to a new rumor. In a post on Weibo, tipster Digital Chat Station, citing supply chain sources, claims that Apple is testing a large 200MP sensor for a future iPhone. The iPhone 17 Pro Max has a triple 48MP camera setup According to the tipster, Apple is evaluating a 1/1.12-inch sensor, a similar unit expected to debut on the upcoming Oppo Find X9 Ultra, which is rumored to feature dual 200MP cameras. The sensor...

title: vivo Y21 makes its debut in India alongside the Y11
description: vivo has launched two new entry-level smartphones in India today. Meet the Y11 and Y21, which both reuse names vivo already went with before - in fact, this is the fourth Y11 so far, following the original from 2014, the one from 2019, and the one from 2023. Thankfully, the Y21 is only the second one ever, following the original Y21 from 2021. Anyway, the 2026 Y11 and Y21 share most specs. Where they differ is in the camera department - the Y11 has a 13MP rear camera, while the Y21 gets a 50MP sensor. The Y21 has faster 44W charging too (vs. 15W on the Y11), and one of the colors has a...

title: Infinix Hot 70's FCC certification reveals two battery capacities
description: Back in February, the upcoming Infinix Hot 70 Pro got spotted on a customer care website, which revealed some of its specs. Now, the 'vanilla' Infinix Hot 70 has been certified by the FCC with two model numbers - X6895 and X6895B. The certification reveals that the two models have different battery capacities, rated at 5,430 mAh and 5,600 mAh, respectively. The X6895B version supports 45W wired charging. Both iterations have the same measurements: 167.92 x 79.12 x 7.64 mm. Aside from the battery capacity difference, they seem to be identical and they both support LTE, Wi-Fi 5,...

title: Realme sold tens of thousands of P4 Lite 5G units in just two hours
description: Realme launched the P4 Lite 5G in India last week, and it appears that Indians really love this model. Today, the brand has unveiled that it's managed to sell over 60,000 P4 Lite 5G units in just two hours in its first sale. [#InlinePriceWidget,14545,1#] Realme implies this means that the P4 Lite 5G is No.1 in its under-INR 15,000 segment, but that is of course a claim we can't verify. Either way, it is incredibly popular, that's for sure. The phone comes with a 6.8-inch 720x1570 LCD screen with 144Hz refresh rate and 900-nit peak brightness, the Dimensity 6300 SoC at the helm,...

title: iPad (2026) with A18 chip is real as revealed by accessory maker’s listing
description: Apple is expected to launch an updated version of its baseline iPad (2025) soon and it just appeared in a listing for a screen protector by ESR Tech. The iPad 12th Gen (A18) 2026, as the listing calls it, features an identical design to its predecessor, which had the exact same look as the one before it. As per the listing, screen protectors for the upcoming model will be compatible with the older 10th and 11th-generation iPads. iPad (2026) in action Based on previous rumors, the new baseline iPad will arrive with Apple Intelligence, which means it should also receive a...

title: Huawei Mate 80 Pro in for review
description: The Huawei Mate 80 Pro isn't a drastic change, specs-wise, to its predecessor, but makes one giant improvement in comparison - it's a globally available phone. And while the rollout is gradual, you can already order the phone in Malaysia with more markets joining soon. So let's look at it. The Mate 80 Pro is a pretty phone. Its design certainly has more character than that of its predecessor. You've got Huawei's signature circular patterns on the back - there's a MagSafe-like golden circle under the actual camera island circle, which hides a smaller circle with the XMAGE label...

title: AirPods Max 2 now up for pre-order
description: Apple unveiled the AirPods Max 2 earlier this month, and today they have gone up for pre-order, just as promised during the announcement. You can grab a pair for $549/€579/£499/₹67,900. Shipping is currently scheduled for April 2 at Amazon, while Apple's website simply says "early next month". The AirPods Max 2 use the H2 chip, which brings 1.5x more effective ANC. They also come with Adaptive Audio and Live Translation, conversation awareness, Bluetooth 5.3, and a new high dynamic range amplifier that Apple promises will deliver cleaner audio. You can use the AirPods Max 2's...

title: OnePlus 15 gets Android 17 beta 2
description: Google recently released the second beta of Android 17, and today OnePlus is rolling this out to the OnePlus 15. However, do note that the company says this is "best suited for developers and other advanced users". [#InlinePriceWidget,14206,1#] The purpose of this release is to allow app developers and early adopters to create "even better software experiences". The installation requires flashing a ROM, and if you don't have experience in software development or you expect to use the device as a daily driver, it's not recommended to proceed. All data will be wiped with the...

title: Apple adds age verification in the UK with iOS 26.4 and iPadOS 26.4
description: iOS 26.4 and iPadOS 26.4 have a new feature for the UK – age verification. The UK’s Office of Communications (Ofcom) recently ordered social networks (Facebook, Instagram, Snapchat), video sharing sites (YouTube, TikTok) and even games (Roblox) to implement age checks in compliance with the Online Safety Act from 2023. And now Apple has added age verification too. If you use an Apple device in the UK, you will find that certain services and features are restricted in version 26.4. You need to verify that you are 18 or older using a credit card or by scanning your ID. Apple will try to...

title: This is Samsung's iPhone Fold competitor
description: Yesterday a leak brought us CAD-based renders of the upcoming Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8, and today the same source is back with some fresh new CAD-based renders, this time of the Galaxy Z Fold8 Wide, which is apparently launching right alongside the Fold8 and Flip8 this summer. As you may already know from previous rumors, the Fold8 Wide has a wider form-factor, just like its name implies, and is intended to placate Apple's iPhone Fold (or iPhone Ultra), which will also have a wider aspect ratio. The point of these is to not have a square inner screen, but one with an aspect ratio more...

title: Selfix iPhone case hands-on: a case with a rear display and a microSD slot
description: The Selfix case aims to turn your iPhone 17 Pro or iPhone 17 Pro Max into an all-in-one vlogging system. It can also come in handy if you shoot video with an action camera or a drone. The case is currently on Kickstarter. The key selling point – and the reason behind the name – is the display on the back of the case. It allows you to use the main cameras for selfie photos and videos while getting the framing just right. It’s a 1.6” OLED display with 480 x 480px resolution. And yes, it’s round. This seems odd at first, but there’s actually a good reason for it – it preserves compatibility...

title: Apple confirms ads are coming to Maps, introduces new Apple Business platform
description: A recent report revealed that Apple was planning to introduce ads in Maps. The company has now officially confirmed the move as part of its new Apple Business platform. In a press release, Apple announced its new Apple Business platform, which will allow businesses to create local ads on Apple Maps. The service is set to roll out later this summer for businesses in the US and Canada. Ads will appear at the top of search results based on user queries. Maps will also introduce a new Suggested Places feature, offering recommendations based on various factors. The company added that ads...

title: Oppo Watch X3 Mini leaks, here's a first look
description: Last year, Oppo released the Watch X2 in March and followed that up with the Watch X2 Mini in April. History may repeat itself – the Oppo Watch X3 was released earlier this month and Evan Blass just posted the first image of a Mini version. With no further details, we can only speculate about the Oppo Watch X3 Mini. The X3 is a 47mm watch and the X3 Mini should be a 43mm watch. At least that was the case with the two X2 models. Oppo Watch X3 Mini (leaked image) Last year, the X2 was a rebadged OnePlus Watch 3 and the X2 Mini was closely related to the OnePlus Watch 3 43mm. Except...

title: vivo X300 Ultra Photography Edition Kit shown off on video, has tons of camera gear
description: At a time when smartphones ship with the bare minimum of essentials, vivo posts a video showing off the vivo X300 Ultra retail package and the photographer’s kit, which look absolutely lavish with an impressive number of accessories. People who buy the Photography Edition Kit will get a box within a box. Starting with the regular X300 Ultra box, it contains not only a 100W charger, but also a nice case. The vivo X300 Ultra retail package The Kit’s box has that plus a whole drawer full of camera gear. There is another case, which serves as the mounting point for all the...
